user.title: Powerline Network
user.description:
Click 'Next' to scan for Powerline adapters on your network.

Requires raw socket access (CAP_NET_RAW).

Supports: TP-Link, FRITZ!Powerline, devolo, and other HomePlug AV adapters.

confirm.title: Devices Found

error.no_devices_found: No Powerline adapters found. Make sure adapters are plugged in and paired.

abort.already_configured: This Powerline network is already configured.
abort.raw_socket_unavailable: Raw socket access not available. Home Assistant needs CAP_NET_RAW capability. For Docker: use --cap-add=NET_RAW --network=host

init.title: Powerline Network Options
init.description: Adjust polling behavior. Changes take effect immediately.
